note: Seed/sample data. Real feeds populate on the first GitHub Actions run.

osint_news.title: LockBit affiliate breaches managed service provider, exfiltrates 2TB
osint_news.summary: A LockBit affiliate compromised an MSP via a stolen VPN credential and deployed ransomware across downstream clients before detection.

osint_news.title: Volt Typhoon activity observed against U.S. critical infrastructure
osint_news.summary: Researchers link fresh living-off-the-land intrusions in energy and water utilities to the China-nexus group Volt Typhoon.

osint_news.title: Phishing campaign abuses OAuth consent to bypass MFA
osint_news.summary: Attackers trick users into granting malicious OAuth apps read access to mailboxes, sidestepping multi-factor authentication.

osint_news.title: Critical RCE in popular file-transfer appliance under active exploitation
osint_news.summary: Vendor ships emergency patch after reports of mass exploitation; CISA expected to add the CVE to its KEV catalog.

osint_news.title: Scattered Spider pivots to SaaS help-desk social engineering
osint_news.summary: The group is calling IT help desks to reset MFA on high-value accounts, then moving into cloud identity providers.

threat_actors.title: LockBit affiliate breaches managed service provider, exfiltrates 2TB
threat_actors.summary: A LockBit affiliate compromised an MSP via a stolen VPN credential and deployed ransomware across downstream clients before detection.

threat_actors.title: CVE-2026-21345 - File Transfer Appliance RCE
threat_actors.summary: Unauthenticated remote code execution via deserialization in the admin endpoint.

threat_actors.title: Volt Typhoon activity observed against U.S. critical infrastructure
threat_actors.summary: Researchers link fresh living-off-the-land intrusions in energy and water utilities to the China-nexus group Volt Typhoon.

threat_actors.summary: The group is calling IT help desks to reset MFA on high-value accounts, then moving into cloud identity providers.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-21345 - File Transfer Appliance RCE
attack_surface.summary: Unauthenticated remote code execution via deserialization in the admin endpoint.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-19872 - VPN Gateway Auth Bypass
attack_surface.summary: Improper authentication allows session hijacking against the SSL-VPN portal.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-22101
attack_surface.summary: Heap overflow in the image parsing library allows RCE when opening a crafted file.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-22088
attack_surface.summary: SQL injection in a CMS plugin permits database exfiltration.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-22050
attack_surface.summary: Stored XSS in an admin dashboard component.
